title: aster canescens var. viscosus
intro: Aster canescens var. viscosus, also known as wood's aster or sticky aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aster canescens var. viscosus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
